source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Please choose the SMILES expression of the transition-state structure shown in the image, ignoring the arrows. <image_1>
extraction_notes: image_1 contains a PIL image placeholder string, not a path or URL
Mapped answer 'D' to its option text

image_dependency: 题干显式要求根据图中所示的 transition-state structure 作答
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要在图像中
仅凭题干文字无法恢复具体结构，需要视觉识别后再匹配 SMILES
multi_step: 需要先从图像识别过渡态结构，再在 4 个选项中匹配对应的 SMILES
题干包含“ignoring the arrows”，说明需区分结构本体与图中非目标元素
但答案形式为单项选择，整体推理链不算特别长
verifiability: choices 提供 4 个明确候选，答案可直接与选项文本核对
answer_text 明确为 `*NC(=O)O.[B]`，答案边界清晰
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，题目、图像和答案资产登记完整

decision_reasons: asset registry is complete with question, image, and answer present and no recorded issues
high verifiability with explicit answer text and registered multiple-choice candidates supports reliable use
although the problem is highly image-dependent and uses specialized chemistry notation, the required visual asset is available so core semantics are intact
